description: multi-objective optimization with NSGA-II, obtaining a Pareto front on a bi-objective benchmark (read-only)
rules: read-only — computes a Pareto front and writes a report; mutates nothing remote or live
runs the vendored multi_objective_example.py core (NSGA-II on ZDT1) via python3
forces MPLBACKEND=Agg so the Scatter plot never blocks
captures stdout (front size, n_gen, n_eval, first solutions) to record_store/multi_objective.txt
requires the pymoo package at run time; degrades to an empty {} report if it is absent
usage: Set PROBLEM (e.g. zdt1), POP_SIZE, N_GEN. Output: multi_objective.txt.
limitation: The vendored core runs its built-in bi-objective benchmark (ZDT1, NSGA-II); vars document intent. Needs the pymoo library installed to produce real results.
